calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der, via Zoom, for Debra Dolch, Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $1,151,895 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky, via Zoom, for Debra Dolch, Personal Representative.

The sale was confirmed at $1,375,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Additional bond is not required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
